outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Israel kills Ali Larijani, senior Iranian leader, in targeted strike — Iran vows retaliation
outlets.summary: Israel confirms killing of Ali Larijani, former Parliament Speaker and adviser to Supreme Leader. Iran vows 'crushing response.' Lebanon ground offensive enters Day 2.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Day 18: Larijani assassination escalates conflict as EU rejects Hormuz involvement
outlets.summary: Analysis of escalation trajectory after Larijani killing. EU refuses military role in Hormuz. Fertilizer crisis threatens global food supply.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Pentagon exploring off-ramps as targeted killings expand to senior Iranian political leaders
outlets.summary: Pentagon reportedly developing diplomatic off-ramp scenarios even as Israel escalates with Larijani killing. David Sacks calls for de-escalation.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Larijani killing marks new phase — Israel targeting Iran's political class, not just military
outlets.summary: Analysis: killing of Larijani represents expansion from military targets to political leadership.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Israel eliminates Ali Larijani — Trump: 'No one in the regime is safe'
outlets.summary: Frames Larijani killing as decisive victory. David Sacks breaks from hawks, calls for off-ramp. Trump delays China summit.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: Larijani killed: Israel's decapitation strategy accelerates as Iran's leadership crumbles
outlets.summary: Supportive coverage of Israel's targeted killing campaign. Argues regime decapitation strategy is working.

outlets.name: NY Post
outlets.headline: Israel takes out another top Iranian — Larijani killed in precision strike
outlets.summary: Focuses on military effectiveness. Oil steady at $100. Trump promises war ending soon.

outlets.name: The Hill
outlets.headline: White House AI czar Sacks calls for 'off-ramp' as Larijani killing escalates tensions
outlets.summary: Internal White House tension: hawks celebrate Larijani kill while economic advisers push for de-escalation.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Israel kills Ali Larijani — Iran vows retaliation as war enters 18th day
outlets.summary: Iran's Qalibaf calls killing a 'war crime.' EU rejects Hormuz military role. Kallas proposes Black Sea model oil corridor.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran war Day 18: Senior leader Larijani killed as conflict intensifies on all fronts
outlets.summary: Comprehensive Day 18 roundup. Larijani assassination, Lebanon ground offensive, cluster munitions, Pope Leo appeals.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Oil steady near $100 after Larijani killing — markets weigh retaliation risk
outlets.summary: Brent holds at $100.21. Markets assessing whether Larijani killing will trigger escalatory response from Iran.

outlets.name: France 24
outlets.headline: France, UK, Germany, Canada, Italy warn Israel against Lebanon ground offensive escalation
outlets.summary: G5 joint statement warns Israel. Pope Leo makes urgent ceasefire appeal. EU proposes diplomatic solution for Hormuz.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Larijani eliminated: IDF confirms killing of senior Iranian adviser in precision strike
outlets.summary: Day 18 liveblog: Larijani killed, Basij leadership eliminated, Lebanon ground op continues, Knesset votes on deficit.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Katz: 'No one in the regime is beyond our reach' — Israel kills Larijani
outlets.summary: Defense Minister Katz confirms Larijani killing. IDF claims 70% of Iran's missile launchers destroyed.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Day 18: Larijani killed as Israel expands targeting to Iran's political elite
outlets.summary: Analysis: shift from military to political targets. G5 warns against Lebanon escalation. Interceptor shortage concerns.

outlets.name: Israel Hayom
outlets.headline: Historic strike: Ali Larijani killed — Iran's political establishment targeted directly
outlets.summary: Frames killing as strategic achievement. Basij commander also eliminated. IDF ground forces advance in Lebanon.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Ali Larijani killed in Israeli strike — Iran vows 'crushing response'
outlets.summary: Comprehensive coverage of Larijani killing. Parliament Speaker Qalibaf calls it war crime. Araghchi says no ceasefire requested.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Zionist regime murders Ali Larijani — Supreme Leader vows devastating revenge
outlets.summary: State media frames killing as assassination. Mojtaba Khamenei pledges retaliation. Massive public mourning reported.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Martyr Larijani: Islamic Republic vows response to 'cowardly Zionist assassination'
outlets.summary: Official state news agency declares national mourning. Parliament holds emergency session. Military on highest alert.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran's Qalibaf: Larijani killing is a war crime — 'this cycle of war must end'
outlets.summary: Parliament Speaker's dual message: condemns killing while calling for end to cycle of violence.
